enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Chapter-I - Preliminary
Note:
(1) 10 per cent of net assets of CIC shall include real estate or other fixed
assets which are required for its effective functioning but shall not include
other financial investments/loans in non-group companies.
enriched_requirements.object: in non-group companies

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such activities should not
ultimately render creation of any financial asset which the CICs are not
permitted to hold within / outside the group.

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Core Investment
Companies) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Core Investment Companies) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These directions shall come into effect on the day they are placed on the website
of the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: the day they are placed on the website of the Reserve Bank

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These directions shall be applicable to every Core Investment Company
(hereinafter collectively referred to as 'CICs' and individually as a 'CIC'), that is to say, a
non-banking financial company carrying on the business of acquisition of shares and
securities, and which satisfies the following conditions as on the date of the last audited
balance sheet:
(1) it holds not less than 90 percent of its net assets in the form of investment
in equity shares, preference shares, bonds, debentures, debt or loans in group
companies;
enriched_requirements.object: Core Investment Company (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'CICs' and individually as a 'CIC'), that is to say, a non-ban

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Provided that the exposure of such CICs towards InvITs shall be limited to
their holdings as sponsors and shall not, at any point in time, exceed the minimum
holding of units and tenor prescribed in this regard by SEBI (Infrastructure
<image>
Investment Trusts) Regulations, 2014, as amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: in time, exceed the minimum holding of units and tenor prescribed in this regard by SEBI (Infrastructure <image> Investment Trusts) Reg

conditions:
where not contradictory to these
Directions
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The guidelines given in the following Directions, where not contradictory to these
Directions, shall also be applicable to the Core Investment Companies, based on the layer
in which it is categorised.
enriched_requirements.object: the Core Investment Companies, based on the layer in which it is categorised

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Note: For ample clarity, it is clarified that the instructions contained in these
Directions shall prevail in the event of conflict, if any, with these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: of conflict

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Notwithstanding the above, the instructions contained in these Directions shall be
applicable to NBFC-CIC in addition and not in substitution to the other relevant
instructions contained in the directions mentioned in paragraph 7 above.
enriched_requirements.object: in addition and not in substitution to the other relevant instructions contained in the directions mentioned in paragraph 7

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A CIC may make use of 'Guidance Note on Operational Risk Management and
Operational Resilience', as amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: Note on Operational Risk Management and Operational Resilience', as amended from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(12) "hybrid debt" means capital instrument which possesses certain characteristics of
equity as well as of debt;
enriched_requirements.object: certain characteristics of equity as well as of debt

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(13) "investment" means investment in shares, stock, bonds, debentures or securities
issued by the Government or local authority or other marketable securities of a like nature.
enriched_requirements.object: bonds, debentures or securities issued by the Government or local authority or other marketable securities of a like natu

enriched_requirements.object: SEBI (Infrastructure Investment Trusts) Regulations, 2014 and as amended from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (15) "long term investment" means an investment other than a current investment;
enriched_requirements.object: a current investment

where the

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(16) "market value of quoted investments" means the average of the weekly highs and
lows of the closing price of the investments, on a recognized stock exchange where the
investment is most actively traded, during the period of 26 weeks immediately preceding
the end of the financial year at which date the last audited balance sheet is available.
enriched_requirements.object: weekly highs and lows of the closing price of the investments, on a recognized stock exchange where the investment is most actively

Both audited balance sheet and auditor's certificate are required to

CICs shall adhere to paragraphs 47 and 48 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking

enriched_requirements.object: and 48 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Registration, Exemptions and Framework for Scale Based Regu

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The number of layers of a CIC within a Group (including the parent CIC) shall be
restricted to two, irrespective of the extent of direct or indirect holding/ control exercised
Note:
(1) In cases where asset size is aggregated, all the CICs within the group will be
registered as CIC and ANW will be applicable individually.
enriched_requirements.object: irrespective of the extent of direct or indirect holding/ control exercised Note: (1) In cases where asset size is aggregated, a

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Note:
(1) Netting shall be done only in respect of assets where provisions for depreciation
or for bad and doubtful debts have been made.
enriched_requirements.object: respect of assets where provisions for depreciation or for bad and doubtful debts have been made

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Assets which have been deducted from owned funds to arrive at net owned
funds shall have a weight of 'zero'.
enriched_requirements.object: 'zero'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the
terms herein shall bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) "adjusted net worth (ANW)" means -

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(2) "breakup value" means the equity capital and reserves as reduced by intangible
assets and revaluation reserves, divided by the number of equity shares of the investee
company;

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) "carrying cost" means book value of the assets and interest accrued thereon but
not received;

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) "Companies in the Group" means an arrangement involving two or more entities
related to each other through any of the following relationships, viz.

(5) "Conduct of business regulations" means the directions issued by the Reserve
Bank from time to time on Fair Practices Code and Know Your Customer guidelines.

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(6) "control" shall have the same meaning as is assigned to it under clause (e) of sub-

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(7) "Core Investment Company (CIC)" means a core investment company having
total assets of not less than ₹100 crore either individually or in aggregate along with other
CICs in the Group and which raises or holds public funds.
enriched_requirements.object: having total assets of not less than ₹100 crore either individually or in aggregate along with other CICs in the Group and w
by its nature readily realisable and is intended to be held for not more than one year from the date on which such investment i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(9) "customer interface" means interaction between the CIC and its customers while
carrying on its business.
enriched_requirements.object: and its customers while carrying on its business

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(10) "earning value" means the value of an equity share computed by taking the
average of profits after tax as reduced by the preference dividend and adjusted for extra-
ordinary and non-recurring items, for the immediately preceding three years and further
divided by the number of equity shares of the investee company and capitalised at the
following rate:
enriched_requirements.object: equity share computed by taking the average of profits after tax as reduced by the preference dividend and adjusted for extra- ordinar

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Adjusted Net Worth of a CIC shall at no point of time be less than 30 percent of its
aggregate risk weighted assets on balance sheet and risk adjusted value of off-balance
sheet items as on the date of the last audited balance sheet as at the end of the financial
year.
enriched_requirements.object: time be less than 30 percent of its aggregate risk weighted assets on balance sheet and risk adjusted value of off-balance sheet items

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
aggregate shall be taken into account for reckoning the capital ratio.
enriched_requirements.object: for reckoning the capital ratio

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The risk weighted
assets shall be calculated as the weighted aggregate of funded items as detailed
hereunder:
Percentage
Weighted risk assets - On-Balance Sheet items
weight
enriched_requirements.object: weighted aggregate of funded items as detailed hereunder: Percentage Weighted risk assets - On-Balance Sheet items weight

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The aggregate shall be taken into account
for reckoning the minimum capital ratio.
enriched_requirements.object: for reckoning the minimum capital ratio

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This shall have to be again multiplied by the risk
weight of 100.
enriched_requirements.object: multiplied by the risk weight of 100

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The risk adjusted value of the off-balance sheet items shall be calculated
as per the credit conversion factors of non-funded items as detailed hereunder: -
Nature of item Credit conversion factor
Percentage
i) Financial & other guarantees 100
ii) Share/debenture underwriting obligations 50
iii) Partly-paid shares/debentures 100
iv) Bills discounted/rediscounted 100
v) Lease contracts entered into but yet to be
executed
enriched_requirements.object: the credit conversion factors of non-funded items as detailed hereunder: - Nature of item Credit conversion factor Percentage i)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The outside liabilities of a CIC shall at no point of time exceed 2.5 times its Adjusted
Net Worth as on the date of the last audited balance sheet as at the end of the financial
year.
enriched_requirements.object: time exceed 2

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A CIC is required to make a thorough internal assessment of the need for capital
(as reflected in ANW and leverage ratio), commensurate with the risks in its business.
enriched_requirements.object: internal assessment of the need for capital (as reflected in ANW and leverage ratio), commensurate with the risks in its business

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A CIC is required to make disclosures in its financial statements in accordance with
existing prudential guidelines, applicable accounting standards, laws and regulations.
enriched_requirements.object: its financial statements in accordance with existing prudential guidelines, applicable accounting standards, laws and regulatio

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It may be noted that disclosure requirements applicable to lower layers of CICs will
be applicable to CICs in higher layers.
enriched_requirements.object: requirements applicable to lower layers of CICs will be applicable to CICs in higher layers

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The guidelines indicate basic minimum
requirements and a CIC shall strive to achieve higher standards of governance and
disclosure, especially if such disclosures significantly aid in understanding of the financial
position and performance.

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A CIC may omit those line items / disclosures from Annex I which are not applicable
/ not permitted or with no exposure / no transaction both in the current year and previous
year.
enriched_requirements.object: / disclosures from Annex I which are not applicable / not permitted or with no exposure / no transaction both in the current yea

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It may be noted that mere mention of an activity, transaction or item in the
disclosure template does not imply that it is permitted, and a CIC shall refer to the extant
statutory and regulatory requirements while determining the permissibility or otherwise of
an activity or transaction.
enriched_requirements.object: statutory and regulatory requirements while determining the permissibility or otherwise of an activity or transaction

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, a CIC shall include comparative information for narrative and descriptive

Guidelines contained in paragraphs 59 and 60 below;

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:

bring in uniformity in the process of due diligence, while appointing directors, CIC shall
ensure that the procedures mentioned in paragraph 13 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025 are followed and minimum

C.

conditions:
in case there is
no identifiable parent CIC in the group
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The parent CIC in the group or the CIC with the largest asset size, in case there is
no identifiable parent CIC in the group, shall constitute a Group Risk Management
Committee (GRMC).
enriched_requirements.object: Management Committee (GRMC)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The GRMC shall report to the Board of the CIC that constitutes it
and shall meet at least once in a quarter.
enriched_requirements.object: of the CIC that constitutes it and shall meet at least once in a quarter

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The composition of GRMC shall be as under:
(1) The GRMC shall comprise minimum of five members, including executive
members.
enriched_requirements.object: The GRMC shall comprise minimum of five members, including executive members

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) At least two members shall be independent directors, one of whom shall be
the Chairperson of the GRMC.
enriched_requirements.object: of whom shall be the Chairperson of the GRMC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) Members shall have adequate and commensurate experience in risk
management practices.
enriched_requirements.object: experience in risk management practices

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
It must discuss all risk strategies both at an aggregated
level and by type of risk and make recommendations to the Board in accordance
with the group's overall risk appetite.
enriched_requirements.object: both at an aggregated level and by type of risk and make recommendations to the Board in accordance with the group's overa

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Based on the analyses and recommendations of the GRMC, a CIC shall initiate
corrective action, where necessary.

Chief Risk Officers (CROs) appointed in a CIC as per
paragraphs 67 above, shall initiate such corrective action.

A CIC shall submit to the Board, a quarterly statement of deviation certified by the
Chief Executive Officer/ Chief Financial Officer, indicating deviations in the use of
proceeds of any funding obtained by the CIC from creditors and investors from the
objects/ purpose stated in the application, sanction letter or offer document for such
funding.
enriched_requirements.object: a quarterly statement of deviation certified by the Chief Executive Officer/ Chief Financial Officer, indicating deviations in th

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A CIC shall be guided by paragraphs 20 to 22 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Undertaking of Financial Services) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: 20 to 22 of Reserve Bank of India (Non- Banking Financial Companies - Undertaking of Financial Services) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: A CIC shall not, in the normal course, be allowed to open branches overseas.
enriched_requirements.object: course, be allowed to open branches overseas

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A
CIC shall adhere to paragraphs 13 to 15 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Branch Authorisation) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: to 15 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Branch Authorisation) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A CIC shall be guided by paragraphs 28 and 33 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Classification, Valuation and Operation of Investment
Portfolio) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: 28 and 33 of Reserve Bank of India (Non- Banking Financial Companies - Classification, Valuation and Operation of Investment P

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A CIC shall follow the guidelines given in paragraph 12 of Reserve Bank of India
(Non-Banking Financial Companies - Classification, Valuation and Operation of
Investment Portfolio) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: in paragraph 12 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Classification, Valuation and Operation of Inv

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A CIC shall follow the guidelines given in paragraph 29 of Reserve Bank of India
(Non-Banking Financial Companies - Classification, Valuation and Operation of
Investment Portfolio) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: in paragraph 29 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Classification, Valuation and Operation of Inv

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A CIC shall follow the guidelines prescribed in paragraphs 9 to 13 of Reserve
Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Miscellaneous) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: in paragraphs 9 to 13 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Miscellaneous) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A CIC shall be required to follow the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025, issued and as amended
from time to time by the Reserve Bank.
enriched_requirements.object: the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Know Your Customer) Directions, 2025, issued and as amended from ti

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A CIC shall comply with instructions contained paragraph 27 of Reserve Bank of
India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Miscellaneous) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: paragraph 27 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Miscellaneous) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A CIC shall comply with instructions prescribed in paragraph 20 of Reserve Bank
of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Miscellaneous) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: in paragraph 20 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Miscellaneous) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The aspirant CIC shall be guided by paragraphs 34 to 39 of Reserve Bank of
India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Undertaking of Financial Services)
Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: 34 to 39 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Undertaking of Financial Services) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A CIC shall conduct a self-assessment of its existing outsourcing arrangements
and bring these in line with the directions on 'Managing Risks and Code of Conduct in
Outsourcing of Financial Services' as provided at Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Managing Risks in Outsourcing) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: its existing outsourcing arrangements and bring these in line with the directions on 'Managing Risks and Code of Conduct

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A CIC shall comply with the instructions contained in paragraphs 14 and 15 of
Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Miscellaneous) Directions,
2025.
enriched_requirements.object: contained in paragraphs 14 and 15 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Miscellaneous) Directions,

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
CICs shall comply with the instructions contained in Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Credit Information Reporting) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: contained in Reserve Bank of India (Non- Banking Financial Companies - Credit Information Reporting) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
CICs shall be guided by Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Treatment of Wilful Defaulters and Large Defaulters) Directions, 2025 on
procedures for classification of borrowers as wilful defaulters, large defaulters and
related aspects.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Treatment of Wilful Defaulters and Large Defaulters) Directions, 2025 on procedu

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The reporting requirements in respect of CICs as prescribed by Department of
Supervision shall be adhered to.

Consolidation of Financial Statement (CFS) : CICs shall prepare CFS as per
provisions of Companies Act, 2013, so as to provide a clear view of the financials of the
group as a whole.
enriched_requirements.object: provisions of Companies Act, 2013, so as to provide a clear view of the financials of the group as a whole

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For such entities
which are not included in the consolidation, disclosures shall be made in the indicative
format mentioned at paragraph 2 of the Annex I.
enriched_requirements.object: indicative format mentioned at paragraph 2 of the Annex I

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In the process of consolidation, the
auditor of a CIC, as the 'principal auditor', shall use the work of other auditors with
respect to the financial information of other respective entities, subject to auditing
standards as also guidance notes issued by the Institute of Chartered Accountants of
India from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: other auditors with respect to the financial information of other respective entities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A CIC shall maintain a functional website containing basic information about itself and
about its group.
enriched_requirements.object: containing basic information about itself and about its group

The following shall be disclosed by the CIC with regard to group entities that are not
consolidated in the CFS:
